Interface JasperIExcelExporter

All Superinterfaces:
JasperIExporter, Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
JasperIOdsExporter, JasperIXlsxExporter
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractJasperExcelExporter, JasperOdsExporter, JasperXlsxExporter
public interface JasperIExcelExporter extends JasperIExporter

JasperIExcelExporter interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
